title: Run hourly workspace maintenance + GitHub sync
summary: At the top of each hour while active: capture anything meaningful from the last hour, record passive work like push IDs, reread curated memory + today's note for accuracy, tighten stale task/event state, freshness-check future-looking handoff bullets so superseded expectations are cleared or demoted, lightly optimize today's memory without rewriting older daily files, then run the automated GitHub sync immediately afterward if there are meaningful changes worth preserving.

title: Keep mission control online
summary: Watch the local site and restart it if it drops while hazoc is running.
